title: Add Playwright dependency check and auto-install support
goal: 서버 시작 시 Playwright 설치 상태를 확인하고, 미설치 시 setup 상태에 표시하며, 원클릭 설치 엔드포인트를 제공한다. browser_auto 도구가 Playwright 미설치 시 설치 안내를 포함한 에러를 반환하도록 개선한다.

test_requirements.case: check_playwright_status returns installed=True when playwright available
test_requirements.expected: status dict has installed: True, browsers_installed: True

test_requirements.case: check_playwright_status returns installed=False when playwright missing
test_requirements.expected: status dict has installed: False with install_command hint
response has playwright field with installed bool

test_requirements.case: POST /setup/playwright/install runs pip install and playwright install
browser_auto tool returns install instructions when playwright missing
test_requirements.expected: error message includes pip install playwright command

constraints: Do not auto-install on server startup — only check status
Install endpoint must be approval-gated (medium risk)
Do not modify existing browser_auto tool logic for when Playwright IS installed
Use subprocess for pip install, not programmatic pip
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
